arts.ttl: Rob McElhenney warns Tom Brady about the 'mistake' he must avoid with Birmingham City
arts.sum: Rob McElhenney co-owns Wrexham in the National League with fellow actor Ryan Reynolds and has a stake in Championship club Birmingham City, like NFL icon Tom Brady

arts.ttl: Chris Davies reveals Birmingham City injury blow as two players close on comebacks
arts.sum: Dion Sanderson is building up his fitness after making a full recovery from a foot injury and Ethan Laird isn’t far behind. “Lee was training with us but he’s just had another niggle, a little bit of a niggle again, so he’s back in the treatment room again,” said Davies.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies' 'really smart move' noticed as Birmingham City lay down marker to rivals
arts.sum: Chris Davies' tactical tweak and decision to opt for Lyndon Dykes over top scorer Alfie May at Rotherham United on Saturday not only bore fruit for Birmingham City but earned the Blues boss plaudits for his switch up in the front-line. Former Reading winger Jobi McAnuff, who is now an EFL pundit following the end of his playing days, was impressed by Davies ' decision to twist rather than stick with a winning team and he has generally been taken by the new look Blues ' start to their campaign, in which much is expected.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City squad value handed £5m boost after Knighthead transfer spend
arts.sum: On Saturday at Rotherham, and granted captain Krystian Bielik was only missing through suspension, only three players in the entire 18-man squad were at the club last year - they being Keshi Anderson, Paik Seung-ho and Jay Stansfield, the latter who only arrived in the nick of time on transfer deadline day . Speaking of values, Blues, according to Football Transfers, have the 146th most valuable squad of all the clubs and players that they have assessed.

arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Peterborough United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Peterborough United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
